Package org.qubitpi.wilhelm.web.filters

Class CorsFilter

java.lang.Object
org.qubitpi.wilhelm.web.filters.CorsFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.ws.rs.container.ContainerRequestFilter, jakarta.ws.rs.container.ContainerResponseFilter
@Immutable @ThreadSafe @Priority(1) public class CorsFilter extends Object implements jakarta.ws.rs.container.ContainerRequestFilter, jakarta.ws.rs.container.ContainerResponseFilter
CorsFilter is a Jersey pre-matching filter handling CORS.

  • If the request is a preflight request, the webservice registered with CorsFilter will simply bounce back the request with a 200 response with the following headers attached:
    • "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "CSRF-Token, X-Requested-By, Authorization, Content-Type"
    • "Access-Control-Allow-Credentials": "true"
    • "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH"
    • "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
  • If the request is not preflight but cross-origin the "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*" header will be attached to the response
  • If the request is neither preflight nor corss-origin, the response will be send back unmodified
For more information, see this post
